programme.title: Zombie House Flipping
programme.desc: Work on a giant zombie house in one of Orlando's historic districts forces the team to follow certain guidelines that could come at a historic cost.

programme.title: Zombie House Flipping
programme.desc: When Justin and Ashlee take on the flip of a ramshackle two-unit property, they conspire to draw a skeptical Duke and Keith into the mix to fend off a mysterious squatter and complete the tricky multifamily house makeover.

programme.title: Zombie House Flipping
programme.desc: Two risky properties test the Zombie team: a DIY disaster and a promising triplex pushed to the brink by perfectionist upgrades. With budgets tight and the market shifting, they race to turn chaos into profit before these flips fall flat.

programme.title: Zombie House Flipping: Family Business
programme.desc: Tommy Harr bets big on a rundown rural property no other flipper would touch and calls in his family to help pull off the impossible; but once demolition begins, the surprises stack up: major structural damage, infestations, and a back addition with no foundation; what starts as a risky flip quickly turns into a full-scale rebuild; in a bold move to boost value, Tommy gambles on adding a 400-squar

programme.title: Million Dollar Zombie Flips
programme.desc: James Dainard is staring down the most damaged house he's ever seen; floor-to-ceiling mold forces his team to don hazmat suits just to inspect it; the house is damp, decayed, and looks like it's been underwater for years; however, James sees potential: a smart layout, massive yard, breathtaking views, and a chance to create a grand primary suite and modern kitchen; with the scope massive and the r

programme.title: Squatters
programme.desc: A young couple in Philadelphia lists their home for sale, only to find a squatter already living in it; when confronted by Flash's team, he is completely shocked and produces a fraudulent lease; but can Flash see through the scam and help the homeowners take back what's rightfully theirs?

programme.title: Squatters
programme.desc: When a stranger moves in and takes over the new home of Nabih and Kadeisha, Flash and his team are deployed to Dearborn, Michigan with one goal: out squat the squatter; but what starts as a straightforward job becomes a battle of endurance when the trespasser challenges Flash to see who can hold their ground the longest.

programme.title: Squatters
programme.desc: Trey's dream home renovation turns into a nightmare when he discovers squatters have taken over his Atlanta property; after forcing out two occupants, he's left battling a defiant holdout and a brazen fake landlord scheme fueling the chaos; but when Flash and his team arrive, they quickly realize this case will require a very different approach.

programme.title: Squatters
programme.desc: In New York, Maria turns part of her home into an apartment for her grandson-but everything unravels when a negligent tenant living under the same roof as her, refuses to vacate; after barricading the door and cutting off access to her own space, Flash and his team face the escalating battle.

programme.title: Squatters
programme.desc: In Cleveland, Ray is ready to move back home-until he discovers an intruder linked to his previous tenant has taken over his house; when Flash and his team step inside, it's anything but a routine squatter removal job; the house is uninhabitable, and the danger runs far deeper than expected.

programme.title: Squatters
programme.desc: In Washington, three sisters call on Flash after squatters take over their late grandfather's property; the house has been transformed into a hoarder's den, the backyard into a full-blown junkyard, and squatters seem to appear at every turn; to take back the home, Flash sets his sights on the ringleader, hoping the rest will finally fall in line.

programme.title: Storage Wars
programme.desc: The buyers scour a hippie town for 1970s memorabilia; Barry uncovers a relic from his past; Darrell finds a medical device with profit potential.

programme.title: Storage Wars
programme.desc: The buyers lose their minds in West Covina, Calif.; Kenny hunts for cougars, but finds a portable pulpit instead; Ivy shows the ladies how to dress for success.

programme.title: Storage Wars
programme.desc: Ivy tries to continue his winning streak; Rene and Darrell play mind games; Jarrod and Brandi visit a crime scene and travel back in time.

programme.title: Storage Wars
programme.desc: The locker-lookers return to Montebello, Calif., where Darrell hopes to repeat past successes; Brandi learns that Jarrod is facing an important problem.

programme.title: Storage Wars
programme.desc: Rene steals the units in Rancho Palos Verdes, Calif.; Mary's locker reveals a sticky past; Justin demonstrates he can turn a small investment into a big return.

programme.title: Storage Wars
programme.desc: Ivy pranks the competition; Rene and Casey space out; Jarrod and Brandi may have to close their Long Beach store if they can't score a major profit.

programme.title: Storage Wars
programme.desc: Back in Montebello, good things come in small boxes, unless you're Lisa; Ivy's locker brims with sellable items; Emily thanks her lucky stars for a mountain of merch; Kenny and his punchy pal rave about their frenzied find.

programme.title: Storage Wars
programme.desc: Let freedom ring in the Americana dream. Darrell and Brandon find a treasure trove of vintage coins. Brandi and Jarrod discover a newspaper detailing America's favorite pastime, while Rene and Tatiana step up to the plate with some retro gear to go with it. In this episode, the buyers pursue patriotic profits with special Stars and Stripes swipes.

programme.title: Storage Wars
programme.desc: In Fullerton, Dusty drags a busy Lupe to the auction, where she decides to show him that "packed" isn't always "stacked;" Dave refuses to let KinderCare influence his choices, while Emily, intent on following the mystery, ends up short a wheel.

programme.title: Storage Wars
programme.desc: It's a spooky All Hallow's Eve in Huntington Beach, as Kenny books an appearance with his dark side; Brandi finds evidence of a possible payday; Ivy does what he can with whatever he has; Mary's locker requires some rescuing.

programme.title: Storage Wars
programme.desc: Torrance gives props to Dusty & Lupe who are haunted by their locker; Kenny manages to kill several birds with one locker; Brandi gets all medieval with some strange music boxes, while Lisa re-joins the rest of the fleas to drop some new records.
